name: Vegetable Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 can Refrigerated crescent dinner rolls (8 oz)
1/2 cup MIRACLE WHIP or MIRACLE WHIP Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oven to 375°F.
2. Unroll dough into 2 rectangles.
3. Press onto bottom and 1/4 inch up sides of a 13x9 inches baking pan to form crust.
4. Bake for 10 minutes; cool.
5. Mix cream cheese, dressing, and seasoning until well blended.
6. Spread mixture over crust.
7. Top with remaining ingredients.
8. Refrigerate.
9. Cut into squares.
PREP TIME: 20 minutes plus refrigerating.
